_comment_on_cron_and_restart: Railway reads buildCommand and startCommand from this file on every build, but `cronSchedule` and `restartPolicyType` live at the service-instance level and are NOT auto-populated from here. Run `python ops/apply_railway_service_config.py` whenever you change them — that script POSTs the values via the GraphQL serviceInstanceUpdate mutation. Idempotent.
